hero.title: Test Your Knowledge
hero.subtitle: Transform your files and documents into interactive quizzes in moments. Upload a file, configure your settings, and let AI do the rest.

generator.title: New AI-Powered Quiz
generator.description: Upload a PDF or PPTX file and our AI will generate custom questions based on your settings.
generator.fileHint: Accepted formats: PDF, PPTX — Max size 20 MB
generator.fileRequired: Please select a file before generating a quiz.
generator.questionsInvalid: Number of questions must be between 1 and 50.
generator.durationRequired: Duration must be between 1 and 60 minutes.
generator.success: Quiz generated successfully! You can find it in the history below.
generator.error: Failed to generate quiz. Please try again.
generator.tipSource: Use clear, well-structured documents for the best question quality.
generator.tipQuestions: 5–20 questions is recommended for a balanced quiz.
generator.tipDuration: Set the duration according to the difficulty of your quiz.
generator.helpDescription: The AI analyses your file's content, extracts the key concepts, and crafts questions that match the difficulty level and type you selected.

history.title: My Quizzes
history.emptyDescription: Generate your first quiz using the section above.
history.loadError: Failed to load quizzes. Please try again.

attempt.explanationHint: Read each option carefully before answering.
attempt.submitError: Failed to submit quiz. Please try again.
attempt.unanswered: Please answer all questions before submitting.
attempt.completedDesc: Here is how you performed on this challenge.
